deploymentOrder: deploy VPS worker from the same commit
contracts: process-news performs bounded text preparation without Resvg or Canvas
scheduled_posts is the durable editorial render queue
worker claims jobs with SKIP LOCKED and a five-minute lease
render completion is fenced by worker identity
failed rendering uses bounded retry backoff
publish-scheduler requires editorial_ready and a final media asset
Feed, Story and Reel continue using shared templates and smart framing
